title: prunella vulgaris subsp. alba
intro: Prunella vulgaris subsp. alba, also known as white self-heal or white heal-all, is a subspecies of the prunella vulgaris plant, a perennial herb native to Europe, Asia, and North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of prunella vulgaris subsp. alba include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Prunella vulgaris subsp. alba can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including respiratory infections, wounds, and skin irritations.
